question: What are your business hours?
answer: We are open Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM (UTC+5). On weekends we are closed. For urgent matters, please email support@company.com.

question: How can I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password: 1) Go to the login page. 2) Click 'Forgot Password'. 3) Enter your registered email address. 4) Check your inbox for a reset link (valid for 24 hours). 5) Follow the link and set a new password.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal, and bank transfers. For enterprise clients, we also support invoicing with NET-30 terms.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account dashboard under Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Your access continues until the end of the billing period. No refunds are issued for partial months.

question: Is there a free trial?
answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required. After the trial, choose a plan that fits your needs.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach us via: Email: support@company.com | Live chat on our website (business hours) | Phone: +1-800-000-0000 (Mon-Fri 9AM-6PM). Average response time is under 2 hours.

question: Can I export my data?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings > Data Management > Export. You can export your data in CSV, JSON, or PDF format. Exports are available for all paid plans.

question: Do you offer discounts for students or non-profits?
answer: Yes! We offer a 50% discount for verified educational institutions and a 30% discount for registered non-profit organizations. Contact sales@company.com with proof of status.
